body:
# Description

Cancelled by the 2026-04 pre-ACP archive pass. The Continue execution line was superseded and archived.


# [PKT-PRV-027](task-0094): Provider Message Queue

## Purpose

Implement provider message queue.

## Scope

- Queue format
- Messages
- Processing

## Implementation

1. Define format
2. Add messages
3. Implement processing

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Format defined
2. Messages work
3. Processing works
